_description: Structural patterns from a score-90 CRQ. Use ONLY as section/format template. NEVER copy field values.
_WARNING: DIFFERENT TEAM. DO NOT copy: assignment_group, u_affected_application, u_primary_escalation_group, u_secondary_escalation_group, cmdb_ci, u_business_unit. Load functional-CHG3978198-INTL-ET360.json for all team/group fields.

description_section.opening: What is the change? [1-2 sentences summarizing both changes]
description_section.bullet_what:
• What?
  1. <file or component> — <specific change made>
  2. <file or component> — <specific change made>
description_section.bullet_why:
• Why?
  <root cause sentence>. <downstream impact / consumer sentence>.
description_section.criticality: Reason for Criticality: <system> is the source of truth for <business purpose> used by <teams>.
numbered_risk_questions: 1. Describe how testing has reduced risk: <method + env + validation done>
2. Describe how deployment minimizes risk and blast radius: <scope + additive vs destructive + blast radius>
3. Describe production validation: Post-deploy — <action 1>, <validate row counts / confirm data>
4. Describe rollback steps (L2 executable): <revert mechanism + redeploy + re-run>

implementation_section.body:
Merge the PR below. After merge, changes are deployed via automated
   Concord deployment pipeline.
   <PR URL>

   Alerting/Monitoring: Automated. Monitor Concord deployment status in
   the <repo-name> pipeline.
implementation_section.step2:
2. DAG Triggering:
   Trigger the following Airflow DAG in AFaaS prod and monitor the run:
   <dag_id>
implementation_section.step3:
3. Post-deploy validation:
   Run QA job in prod env to check syntax and confirm row counts (see
   Validation Plan below).

numbered_checks:
1. DAG Run Validation:
   Confirm <dag_id> completes successfully in AFaaS prod with no task failures.

2. <Change 1> Validation:
   Query <table_name>
   and confirm <specific assertion — row counts, column values, filter match>.
   Verify row counts are consistent with expected <metric>.

3. <Change 2> Validation:
   Validate that <target> is correctly populated with <data>. Check row counts match source.

criteria: 1. Concord deployment pipeline failure for PR #<number>.
3. Data validation not met — row counts in <table> do not reflect expected <metric>.
backout_section.steps_header: Describe the steps to take to roll back (L2 executable):
backout_section.code_backout:
1. Code Backout:
   a) Go to PR #<number> on gecgithub01.walmart.com, click "Revert" in the
      Conversation tab. This creates a new Revert PR.
   b) Verify the Revert PR performs the exact opposite of the merged PR.
      Get it reviewed and merged.
   <PR URL>
backout_section.rerun:
2. Re-run impacted DAG:
   After revert is deployed, re-trigger the affected <DAG name>
   to restore the prior state of <table>.
